title: Saint Petersburg
description: Russia's cultural heart — baroque palaces, the Hermitage, romantic canals and the legendary White Nights.

title: Sochi
description: The 'Russian Riviera' — golden Black Sea beaches, alpine mountain resorts and the 2014 Winter Olympics venues.

title: Kazan
description: The multicultural capital of Tatarstan — UNESCO Kazan Kremlin, the grand Qolsharif Mosque and a unique blend of Russian and Eastern cultures.

title: Golden Ring
description: Ancient Russian towns — Sergiev Posad, Vladimir, Suzdal and Yaroslavl — preserving medieval kremlin walls and Orthodox heritage.

title: Moscow
description: Russia's dynamic capital — Red Square, the Kremlin, Tretyakov Gallery and a thriving modern arts scene.

title: Murmansk
description: Above the Arctic Circle, Murmansk delivers breathtaking Northern Lights spectacles, polar day adventures and authentic Russian Arctic culture.
